title: Thai Pork Casserole
description: A spicy and flavorful Thai-inspired casserole dish, featuring marinated pork and a variety of vegetables.

ingredients.name: classic
ingredients.amount: 2 cups, mixed vegetables (e.g., bell peppers, carrots)

instructions: In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced cherry and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the mixed vegetables and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
In a separate pan, cook the ground pork over medium-high heat, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the cooked rice to the pork mixture and stir to combine.
Add the cooked vegetable mixture to the pork and rice mixture and stir to combine.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the coconut milk, soy sauce, fish sauce, and brown sugar.
Pour the coconut milk mixture over the pork and vegetable mixture and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with additional sliced cherry if desired.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the casserole is hot and the cheese is melted.
Optional: garnish with chopped fresh cilantro or scallions.
